user_goals: connect with other users via messaging
filter results to match specific criteria
pain_points: unclear form functionality may cause confusion
potential information overload without proper filtering

intelligent_user_stories.title: Enhanced Local Search with Map Results
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a buyer, I want to search for items and see their locations on a map so that I can find products/services near me without having to visit multiple listings
acceptance_criteria: Search results display both list and map view simultaneously
Map markers show item locations with basic details on hover
Distance from user location is displayed for each result
Map view updates dynamically as search filters are applied
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Increases user engagement by 40% and reduces time-to-purchase by enabling location-based decision making

intelligent_user_stories.title: Video-Enhanced Product Listings
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a seller, I want to upload and showcase video content for my listings so that I can demonstrate products in action and build buyer confidence
acceptance_criteria: Video upload supports common formats (MP4, MOV, AVI)
Video preview available before publishing
Thumbnail auto-generation for video content
Video compression maintains quality while reducing file size
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Listings with videos convert 60% better and command 15% higher prices compared to photo-only listings

intelligent_user_stories.title: Smart Filtering with Saved Preferences
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a service provider, I want to save my frequently used filter combinations so that I can quickly find relevant opportunities without reconfiguring searches each time
acceptance_criteria: Users can save up to 5 custom filter presets
Saved filters include location radius, price range, category, and keywords
Quick access dropdown for saved filter sets
Ability to modify and update existing saved filters
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Reduces user churn by 25% and increases daily active usage by improving search efficiency

intelligent_user_stories.title: In-App Messaging with Transaction Context
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a buyer, I want to message sellers directly within the platform with automatic context about the specific listing so that I can ask relevant questions without losing conversation thread
acceptance_criteria: Message thread automatically includes listing title and price
Conversation history remains accessible from both user profiles
Quick response templates for common questions
Listing status updates reflect in conversation (sold, price changed, etc.)
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Increases successful transactions by 35% through improved communication and reduces support tickets by 20%

intelligent_user_stories.title: Community Member Location Verification
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a local community member, I want to verify the actual location of listings and services so that I can trust the accuracy of location-based searches and avoid wasting time
acceptance_criteria: Sellers can verify their location through GPS or address confirmation
Verified locations display a trust badge on listings
Map shows confidence radius for location accuracy
Users can report location discrepancies
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Builds platform trust leading to 30% higher user retention and reduces location-related disputes by 50%

intelligent_user_stories.title: Simplified Form Completion with Progressive Disclosure
intelligent_user_stories.story: As a seller, I want form fields to appear progressively based on my previous selections so that I'm not overwhelmed by irrelevant options and can complete listings efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Initial form shows only essential fields (title, category, price)
Additional relevant fields appear based on category selection
Form saves progress automatically every 30 seconds
Clear progress indicator shows completion percentage
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Increases listing completion rate by 40% and reduces abandoned form submissions by 55%

intelligent_user_stories.title: Video Performance Optimization
intelligent_user_stories.story: As any user, I want videos to load quickly and play smoothly regardless of my internet connection so that I can evaluate video content without frustration
acceptance_criteria: Videos begin playing within 2 seconds on average connection
Adaptive quality based on connection speed
Fallback thumbnail with 'play' button if video fails to load
Progress indicator shows buffering status
intelligent_user_stories.business_value: Reduces bounce rate by 20% and increases video engagement time by 45%, leading to higher conversion rates

intelligent_features.name: Search
intelligent_features.purpose: Allows users to find specific items, services, or content by entering keywords or phrases
intelligent_features.target_user: buyers, sellers, service providers, local community members

intelligent_features.name: Filter
intelligent_features.purpose: Enables users to narrow down search results by specific criteria like location, price, category, or other attributes
intelligent_features.target_user: buyers, service providers, local community members

intelligent_features.name: Messaging
intelligent_features.purpose: Facilitates direct communication between users for negotiations, questions, and coordination
intelligent_features.target_user: buyers, sellers, service providers, local community members

intelligent_features.name: Maps
intelligent_features.purpose: Provides geographical context and location-based discovery of items, services, or users
intelligent_features.target_user: buyers, service providers, local community members

intelligent_features.name: Video
intelligent_features.purpose: Allows users to showcase products/services through multimedia content or consume video-based information

intelligent_features.name: Forms
intelligent_features.purpose: Enable data collection, user input, listing creation, or profile management (specific functionality unclear)
intelligent_features.target_user: sellers, service providers, local community members

ai_recommendations.title: Clarify Form Functionality and Purpose
ai_recommendations.description: Replace the unknown forms with clearly labeled, purpose-driven forms that guide users through specific actions. Add form titles, field labels, help text, and progress indicators. Implement smart form validation with real-time feedback to reduce user confusion and abandonment.

ai_recommendations.title: Integrate Map and Search Results
ai_recommendations.description: Create a unified search experience that displays results in both list and map format simultaneously. Allow users to toggle between views and interact with map markers to see listing details. Add distance sorting and radius-based filtering to improve local discovery and increase transaction completion rates.

ai_recommendations.title: Implement Progressive Video Loading
ai_recommendations.description: Add video compression, adaptive quality streaming, and lazy loading to ensure videos load within 2 seconds. Include thumbnail previews with play buttons as fallbacks. Implement video analytics to track engagement and optimize content strategy based on viewing patterns.

ai_recommendations.title: Add Social Proof and Trust Indicators
ai_recommendations.description: Implement user ratings, reviews, verification badges, and transaction history displays. Add seller/service provider profiles with completion rates and response times. Include trust signals like secure payment badges and community guidelines to increase user confidence and platform adoption.

ai_recommendations.title: Enhance Messaging System with Context
ai_recommendations.description: Upgrade messaging to include automatic listing context, quick reply templates, and read receipts. Add conversation threading by listing and enable file/image sharing within chats. Implement notification preferences to reduce spam while ensuring important messages are delivered promptly.

ai_recommendations.title: Create Category-Specific Landing Pages
ai_recommendations.description: Develop targeted landing pages for different user types and categories (e.g., 'For Sellers', 'Local Services', 'Buy & Sell'). Include relevant search shortcuts, featured listings, and educational content about platform features. Optimize for SEO to attract organic traffic and improve user onboarding.

ai_recommendations.title: Implement Smart Filter Recommendations
ai_recommendations.description: Add AI-powered filter suggestions based on user behavior, location, and popular searches. Create filter presets for common use cases and allow users to save custom filter combinations. Display result counts for each filter option to set proper expectations and reduce zero-result frustration.
